type_definitions.name: GitShowTrackBlobReader
type_definitions.description: Existing infrastructure secondary adapter implementing TrackBlobReader via git show. Extended by this track to implement the two new port methods added to TrackBlobReader: read_catalogue_for_spec_ref_check (git show origin/<branch>:track/items/<id>/<layer>-types.json → BlobFetchResult<(TypeCatalogueDocument, String)>; String = SHA-256 of raw bytes for stale detection, same tuple pattern as existing read_type_catalogue) and read_catalogue_spec_signals_document (git show origin/<branch>:track/items/<id>/<layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json decoded as CatalogueSpecSignalsDocument). All existing guard patterns are reused: symlink rejection, LANG=C fixation, BlobResult, path-not-found stderr parsing per ADR 2026-04-12-1200 §D4. action=modify because the adapter struct already exists in libs/infrastructure/src/verify/merge_gate_adapter.rs.

informal_grounds.summary: IN-08 (ADR D3.6) extends GitShowTrackBlobReader with two new git-show blob fetch methods; existing guard patterns are reused; hash will be computed at implementation time

type_definitions.name: FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore
type_definitions.description: New infrastructure secondary adapter implementing CatalogueSpecSignalsWriter via filesystem atomic write. Writes <layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json to track/items/<track_id>/<layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json using the same atomic write pattern as FsTrackStore / FsReviewStore. Placed in libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/ (new module). Takes a workspace root path and delegates serialization to CatalogueSpecSignalsDocumentDto via serde_json.

informal_grounds.summary: IN-08 (ADR D3.1 / D3.7) requires atomic write of <layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json; FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore is the infrastructure adapter following the FsTrackStore / FsReviewStore pattern; implements CatalogueSpecSignalsWriter port (port name inferred from TrackWriter / ImplPlanWriter / ReviewWriter pattern; ADR D3.7 names only the infrastructure adapter, the port follows D3.7's hexagonal separation mandate); hash will be computed at implementation time

type_definitions.name: CatalogueSpecSignalsDocumentDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure serde DTO for <layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json (schema v1). Fields: schema_version (u32, = 1), catalogue_declaration_hash (String, 64-char hex), signals (Vec<CatalogueSpecSignalDto>). deny_unknown_fields enforced at all nesting levels. No generated_at field (deterministic output per CN-06 / ADR D2.2). Used by the CatalogueSpecSignals codec (encode and decode) in libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/catalogue_spec_signals_codec.rs. Mirrors domain CatalogueSpecSignalsDocument.

informal_grounds.summary: IN-11 (ADR D2.2) defines schema v1 fields (schema_version / catalogue_declaration_hash / signals[]); no generated_at; hash will be computed at implementation time

type_definitions.name: CatalogueSpecSignalsCodecError
type_definitions.description: Error enum for the <layer>-catalogue-spec-signals.json codec. Variants follow existing codec conventions: Json (serde_json failures), UnsupportedSchemaVersion (version != 1), Validation (domain construction errors from CatalogueSpecSignal or ContentHash). Placed in libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/catalogue_spec_signals_codec.rs alongside CatalogueSpecSignalsDocumentDto.

informal_grounds.summary: IN-11 (ADR D2.2) requires a codec for the new schema v1 file; error variants follow the ImplPlanCodecError / TaskCoverageCodecError pattern; hash will be computed at implementation time
